name: space-cart-logistics
title: Space Cart Logistics
author: gofarovich
description: Tile-sized rails and externally-routed carts (OHT/AMHS-style), simulated entirely in Lua. Milestone 5: intersection arbitration (give-way-to-the-right + absolute N>E>S>W tiebreak) over the cell model, snake-deque convoys (join/split), bitmask rails and right-hand routing.
